description:
Letter fragment (lower part) from a muqaddam named Moshe (b. Perahya. AA), probably addressed to the dayyanim of Fustat, complaining that after the death of the Nagid Avraham his unworthy opponent had been appointed. A sick, old man is mentioned in the margin, but the surrounding text is damaged, so it is unclear if this is an aspersion directed at the rival or a complaint about his own condition. (Information in part from Goitein's index cards.) ASE 
Written by Moshe b. Perahya himself, who was the muqqadam of Minyat Zifta and Minyat Ghamar. AA
tags: Illness, communal, illness letter 969-1517, Muqaddam, Nagid
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
